summary: Front NG at $3.296 sits modestly above the fair-value midpoint ($2.958) but remains comfortably inside the model band ($2.458–$3.458), signalling no extreme mispricing. The pivotal tension is a near-term demand dip (days 1-7 forecast at -11.8% vs 5y) that precedes an exceptional heat event in days 8-16 (+22.5% vs 5y, with rangePos above 1.0 — above the 5-year maximum range).
